1. Ezra Klein essay, adapted from his Abundance book with Derek Thompson ( https://www.nytimes.com/2025/03/09/opinion/musk-trump-doge-abundance-agenda.html# )  (NYT).

2. Ancient transport vehicles, without wheels, in New Mexico ( https://www.washingtonpost.com/science/2025/03/09/travois-ancient-transportation-indigenous-americas/ ) .

3. Was Victor Hugo also a great visual artist? ( https://www.thetimes.com/culture/art/article/astonishing-things-drawings-victor-hugo-royal-academy-london-t3vxxbx3m )  (Times of London).  Further links here ( https://www.google.com/search?q=victor+hugo+visual+artist&sca_esv=248c1a1232d6ce85&source=hp&ei=eJzNZ-jGCr3n5NoP19mI2Ak&iflsig=ACkRmUkAAAAAZ82qiBf-TJJIc8wXH-aV-OtD0vqtZ8Y2&ved=0ahUKEwjo4qKGkv2LAxW9M1kFHdcsApsQ4dUDCBo&uact=5&oq=victor+hugo+visual+artist&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz ) .

4. It turns out Buffy Sainte-Marie isn't even Canadian? ( https://www.cbc.ca/news/entertainment/buffy-sainte-marie-awards-1.7477741 )

5. Is brick making a comeback in urban architecture? ( https://www.msn.com/en-us/arts/architecture/brick-is-back/ar-AA1Akhok )

6. Florence Nightingale, statistician ( https://x.com/kareem_carr/status/1898435171352777015 ) .
